strengths: Clear identification of three distinct objects with specific real-world contexts
Explicit restatement of the IA prompt and consistent reference back to it for each object
Use of external references (Siegel, Kumar et al.) and TOK concepts (truth, areas of knowledge) to support claims
weaknesses: Analysis often remains descriptive and overly personal, especially in the keychain section
Links between imagination and knowledge production are at times tenuous or under-developed
Inconsistent integration and critical evaluation of cited evidence; several unfinished or cut-off analytical points
Limited use of TOK terminology (e.g., âshared knowledgeâ, âinterpretationâ), which reduces analytical depth
feedback.calculationMethod: Holistic AI evaluation: The studentâs exhibition clearly meets the criteria for band 5â6: three well-identified objects, real-world contexts, and justified links to the prompt. Strengths include explicit engagement with the chosen IA question and some use of external evidence. However, the analysis frequently lacks depth and precision, relying on personal narrative and descriptive accounts rather than rigorous epistemic exploration. Connections between imagination and knowledge production are sometimes asserted without sufficient support, and TOK terminology is under-utilized. On balance, this work surpasses the superficial treatment of band 3â4 but does not achieve the consistently well-supported, precise analysis required for band 7â8. A final score of 6 appropriately reflects its placement at the top of band 5â6.

annotations.comment: The student links the keychain to self-knowledge but should articulate more precisely how imagination operates as a way of knowing, referencing TOK terminology such as âpersonal knowledgeâ and âperspectivesâ.
The student clearly restates the IA prompt at the outset, providing an explicit focus for the exhibition. This establishes the intended TOK question effectively.

The image caption identifies the object but remains isolated from the analysis. Integrate the description into your argument to show how this specific keychain context links to imagination producing knowledge.

This paragraph is largely personal narrative. To deepen the TOK analysis, move beyond description to examine how imagining a future career functions epistemically in the AOKs of the natural sciences and human sciences.

Here the student asserts that imagination produced knowledge about study choices, but the analysis lacks depth. Consider exploring the mechanisms by which imagining outcomes motivates engagement with specific AOKs.
An incomplete sentence appears at the end of this section, disrupting coherence. Ensure that all analytical points are fully articulated to maintain clarity.
This reflection on neglected artistic skills is descriptive rather than analytical. To strengthen the link to the prompt, examine how imagination can both generate and constrain different AOKs.

The caption labels the metalens but does not specify why this particular image enhances the TOK claim. Explicitly connect the visual choice to your argument about imagination in scientific innovation.
A citation (Siegel) is provided but remains unexamined. Evaluate the credibility and perspective of this source to show critical engagement with evidence supporting your TOK claims.
The image description is thorough but could inform an analysis of materiality. Discuss how the tangible design of the metalens embodies scientistsâ imaginative hypotheses about light manipulation.

The link between science-fiction imagination and actual research is asserted without specific evidence. Provide documented examples or scientist testimonies showing direct inspiration to solidify the causal claim.
Listing applications of metamaterials is informative but untethered to the prompt. Analyse how imaginative conceptualizations shaped multiple lines of research rather than simply listing uses.
This sentence is cut off, leaving the argument unfinished. Complete all analytical statements to ensure each TOK claim is fully developed.

The contrast between ânaturalâ and metamaterial is interesting but presented as broad assertion. Tie this to the natural sciencesâ methodologies to illustrate how imagination challenges established truth claims.

Object identification is clear but the significance of choosing the 75th-anniversary edition is unaddressed. Reflect on how this specific context adds nuance to your exploration of imagination and knowledge.
The image description is precise but the analysis misses an opportunity to discuss edition-specific elements (foreword, introduction) that shape reader interpretation and knowledge production.
The plot summary is too extensive. Shift focus from retelling the story to critically analysing how Orwellâs imaginative metaphor functions as a vehicle for political knowledge.

TOK terminology is under-utilized here. Incorporate concepts such as âshared knowledgeâ, âperspectivesâ and âinterpretationâ to lend precision to the explanation of metaphorical knowledge production.
The claim that the novel produced knowledge about extremism lacks substantiation. Provide specific examples from the text or references to critical reception to support this epistemic impact.
The conclusion effectively summarizes the exhibition but remains descriptive. To achieve greater depth, reflect on limitations of using imagination as a way of knowing, and consider counter-examples.
The conclusion would benefit from explicitly restating the IA prompt and tying together how each object collectively illuminates the role of imagination in producing knowledge.
The 'Works Cited' heading is present but the overall formatting does not follow a consistent academic style guide. Standardize heading and list style.
There is a duplicate entry for the Siegel source and inconsistent use of italics and quotation marks. Clean up redundancies and apply uniform citation formatting.
Some in-text references (e.g., Siegel, Kumar et al.) are not matched precisely in the bibliography. Verify that every cited work appears accurately in the list.

rubricCriterionStrandBandContents.content: The exhibition does not reach the standard described by the other levels or does not use one of the IA prompts provided.

The exhibition presents
three objects, but the
real-world contexts of
these objects are not
stated, or the images
presented may be
highly generic images of
types of object rather
than of specific
real-world objects. Links
between the objects
and the selected IA
prompt are made, but
these are minimal,
tenuous, or it is not
clear what the student is
trying to convey.
There is very little
justification offered for
the inclusion of each
object in the exhibition.
The commentary on the
objects is highly
descriptive or consists
only of unsupported
assertions.

The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of the objects may be implied rather than explicitly stated. Basic links between the objects and the selected IA prompt are made, but the explanation of these links is unconvincing and/or unfocused. There is a superficial justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Reasons for the inclusion of the objects are offered, but these are not supported by appropriate evidence and/or lack relevance to the selected IA prompt. There may be significant repetition across the justifications of the different objects

The exhibition identifies three objects, although the real-world contexts of these objects may be vaguely or imprecisely stated. There is some explanation of the links between the three objects and the selected IA prompt. There is some justification for the inclusion of each object in the exhibition. Some of the points are supported by evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

The exhibition identifies three objects and their real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are explained, although this explanation may lack precision and clarity in parts. There is a justification of the contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. Many of the points are supported by appropriate evidence and references to the selected IA prompt.

The exhibition clearly identifies three objects and their specific real-world contexts. Links between each of the three objects and the selected IA prompt are clearly made and well-explained. There is a strong justification of the particular contribution that each individual object makes to the exhibition. All, or nearly all, of the points are well-supported by appropriate evidence and explicit references to the selected IA prompt.

rubricCriterionStrands.name: Does the exhibition successfully show how TOK manifests in the world around us?
